minecraft:lore: {"text": "📊 武器等级: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "Lv.8", "color": "#FFD700", "bold": true}]}

{"text":"💥 伤害: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"24-30","color":"red","bold":true}]}
{"text":"☆ 暴击率: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"+6%","color":"gold","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚡ 攻击速度: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"3.0/秒","color":"aqua","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚒ 技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"毒刃","color":"light_purple","bold":true},{"text":" (右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}

{"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
